t-1.notes: feature: self-contained asset distribution · assets.FS @ assets/embed.go · embeds all command skills+prompts (all: prefix keeps _interaction.md); TestEmbedDrift guards embed vs on-disk drift

t-2.notes: feature: self-update core · update.Client @ internal/update/update.go · platform asset-name, SHA-256 verify, strictly-newer semver, atomic swap; httptest-backed

t-3.notes: feature: unified install · cmd.Install @ internal/cmd/install.go · materializes embedded skills+prompts (symlink off checkout, copy otherwise), prunes dross-* namespace, spares non-dross

t-4.notes: feature: unified install · Makefile install target · delegates skills/prompts sync to dross install --link, dropping the inline ln/loop

t-5.notes: feature: self-update · cmd.Update @ internal/cmd/update.go · fetch+verify+atomic-swap latest release, --check/--force, re-syncs assets by exec'ing the new binary

t-6.notes: feature: curl|sh bootstrap · install.sh · uname-detect+download+verify+stage-then-mv installer, runs dross install; shellcheck CI gate + hardened ci.yml

t-7.notes: feature: install/update docs · README Install section · curl|sh one-liner + dross update flow, doc-guard test
